unit_tests.starkshift_test package¶

Submodules¶

unit_tests.starkshift_test.conftest module¶

unit_tests.starkshift_test.test_starkshift module¶

unit_tests.starkshift_test.test_starkshift.random() → x in the interval [0, 1).¶
unit_tests.starkshift_test.test_starkshift.test_temp()[source]¶

Verifies that the temperature parameter and change_temperature function works.

unit_tests.starkshift_test.test_starkshift.test_temp_interp()[source]¶

Verifies that the correct interpolated g-factor value is returned when different temperatures are specified in the object.
